title: support for system verilog
body:
Hi,

I was just trying out icarus verilog on edaplayground and it seemed as if basic constructs such as` always_ff, always_comb, logic `are not supported?
May I check if this is the case for icarus in general or is it specifically for the version in cocotb?
Additionally, if icarus does support some system verilog constructs, may I please know where I can check what those are(I have heard it supports a few)

Thanks a lot!
